Plat-m..personality: A proud, haughty woman who overestimates herself and looks down on others as inferior. She is hysterical in temperament, prone to dramatic mood swings between mania and melancholy, and her symptoms arise from wounded pride, fright, or prolonged emotional excitement.
Plat-m..mental_state: Dominated by delusions of grandeur—she imagines herself high-born, her body larger than others, and that she does not belong to her race. She broods in corners, talks of fanciful things, and may become insane over religious matters or descend into sexual perversion with unchaste speech. Mental symptoms characteristically alternate with physical symptoms such as numbness and spasms.
Plat-m..emotional_pattern: Deeply fearful yet contemptuous—she dreads that something terrible will happen and fears death while simultaneously loathing life. She is intensely irritable over trifles, weeps easily, and is restless with constant palpitation and trembling at the slightest excitement. Any disturbance to her pride or any sexual excitement triggers the full cascade of her symptoms.
